pre_game.message: Hi, I'm C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What brought you here today?
Hey C, I'm I. It definitely is. Honestly, I'm here to win some money for the people I care about back home. What about you?
Same here. I’m really determined to win this for my family back home—it would make a huge difference for us.
I totally get that. It’s what keeps you focused. Do you have a strategy for when the game actually starts?
Honestly, not a set one yet since we don't know the rules, but I'm trying to see who I can trust. How about you?
I’m with you on that. Without knowing the rules yet, all we really have is each other’s word, so I’m definitely looking for someone reliable to team up with.
I agree. It’s much better to have someone you can count on in a situation like this. Let's keep an eye out for each other as things get started.
Absolutely. It's a deal. I'm glad we've got each other's backs before things really kick off.
Same here. It’s a relief to have an ally. Have you noticed anything about the others yet?
Everyone seems pretty guarded, honestly. I'm going to circulate a bit and see if I can get a read on anyone else. Talk soon!
Sounds like a plan, I'll do some scouting too; let's compare notes in a bit.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
It was indeed a successful and fair outcome. I'm glad we were able to reach a mutually beneficial agreement.
